events.venue: Card Vault by Tom Brady — 3030 Nowitzki Way
events.notes: Free photos and autographed 8x10s. Appearing alongside Rolando Blackman. 5:30–6:30 PM.

events.venue: Card Vault by Tom Brady — 3030 Nowitzki Way
events.notes: 4-time NBA All-Star, Dallas Mavericks great. Free photos and autographed 8x10s. Appearing alongside Devin Harris. 5:30–6:30 PM.
Autograph signing. $40 per item. 4–5 PM. No exceptions, no drop-offs — must be present.
Meet & greet and Q&A. Premier League champion with Leicester City 2015–16, Japan national team hero, Bundesliga legend. In collaboration with @sporta_japan and @newyorkfoxes.

Legends match celebrating the 1994 FIFA World Cup — USA vs Brazil legends teams. Specific players and meet & greet TBA. Tickets not yet released. Presented by LIC by MTR7, broadcast in Brazil by NSports.

Jogo das Estrelas — Edição Lisboa. Amigos do Ronaldinho Gaúcho vs Amigos do Deco. Charity match in aid of Leiria. Tickets at jogodoronaldinho.pt. Meet & greet TBA — follow @pereirajogodasestrelas for updates.

Juventus Legends Night — exclusive buffet dinner. Ticket includes digital photo with both players (free). Adults €70, kids 4-10 €35. Bookings: +356 9945 3421. Organised by Black & White Malta (@blacknwhitemalta).

events.player: DRX World Legends vs Barça Legends
events.notes: Clash of Legends — DRX World Legends vs Barça Legends. Presented by DRX. Legends include Ronaldo Nazário, Ribery and others. Meet & greet TBA — follow @clashoflegends.id for updates.

events.player: Barça Legends vs Real Madrid Leyendas
events.notes: The Legends Cup. Barça: Xavi, Puyol, R. Márquez, Cocu, Saviola, Mendieta, Nolito, Vítor Baía. Real Madrid: Casillas, Hierro, Figo, Morientes, Calejón, Raúl Bravo. Tickets on Ticketmaster. No fan M&G confirmed.
